Witch Head Nebula

Mentions Timeline (17 articles)
3309-02-23
Thargoid War Update: February 3309
Vox Galactica provides an overview of Thargoid war developments in February 3309, noting 634 overrun systems versus 61 liberated.
3309-02-16
Thargoids Devastate Witch Head Enclave
Thargoid fleets overrun populated systems in the Witch Head Nebula, destroying starports and leaving tens of thousands of casualties.
3308-06-13
Alliance Divided over Anti-Xeno Pact
The Alliance Assembly is deadlocked over ratifying the strategic defence pact with Sirius Corporation, with Prime Minister Edmund Mahon advocating for military strength while Councillor Nakato Kaine warns against corporate infiltration.
3308-06-08
Alliance-Sirius Pact Enters Approval Stage
The Alliance-Sirius Corporation anti-xeno defence pact enters its final approval stage before an Assembly vote.
3308-04-13
Sirius Defends Alliance Territory
Sirius Corporation deploys megaships to the Coalsack and Witch Head Nebulas to provide anti-xeno support for the Alliance.
3307-12-21
Thargoid Presence Persists in Multiple Systems
Thargoid vessels continue to appear in over two dozen populated systems near nebulas, with organised pilot task forces achieving mixed success against the invaders.
3307-12-15
The Triumph of Salvation
Salvation confirms his anti-xeno superweapons successfully routed Thargoids from Delphi, Maia and Merope, and urges unity behind his crusade while dismissing Aegis as finished.
3307-01-07
Thargoids Wreak Havoc in Nebulas
Starports in The Coalsack and Witch Head Nebulas have been damaged during full-scale Thargoid incursions.
3306-10-21
Thargoid Incursion Repelled in Witch Head Enclave
The galactic community successfully repels a Thargoid attack in the Witch Head Enclave. Most alien vessels are destroyed. Captain Warren Lamar praises the pilots' courage.
3306-10-15
Thargoids Return to Witch Head Nebula
Thargoids reappear in the Witch Head Nebula, swarming through Onoros, Lembass, Haki, Wellington and Shenve. Captain Warren Lamar calls for independent pilots to help defend the Witch Head Enclave.
3306-01-13
Thargoid Incursions in Witch Head Enclave
Thargoid incursions resume in the Witch Head Enclave, alarming colonists six months after the initial expansion. Professor Alba Tesreau of Aegis Research warns that the Thargoids remain intent on driving humanity out of the region.
3305-08-08
Witch Head Planetary Ports Established
Seven planetary ports are established in the Witch Head Nebula, with Alliance, Federation and Empire each contributing two ports. Cinder Dock hosts Chloe Sedesi's engineering facility. A tech broker and material trader also set up services.
3305-08-06
Further Migration to Witch Head Nebula
Engineer Chloe Sedesi, former apprentice of Professor Ishmael Palin, migrates to the Witch Head Nebula to establish an engineering facility at Cinder Dock. The enclave attracts thousands seeking a fresh start.
3305-07-31
Enclave Established in Witch Head Nebula
Independent pilots successfully repel Thargoid forces from the Witch Head Nebula, allowing the Alliance, Empire and Federation to establish an official human enclave with shared colonial assets.
3305-07-25
Thargoids Defend Meta-Alloy Sources
Thargoid forces attack human colonisation efforts in the Witch Head Nebula and increase activity in the Pleiades, aggressively defending barnacle sites that are humanity's primary source of meta-alloys.
3305-07-11
Alternative Source of Meta Alloys Identified
Aegis confirms the Witch Head Nebula contains sufficient barnacle sites to replace depleted Pleiades sources. All three superpowers dispatch advance teams to establish megaships and Ocellus starports.
3302-06-27
Freelance Report Canonn at Full Tilt
